findings.evidence: `rg` hits show the same declaration sequence and proof skeleton in `code/TauCeti/Algebra/Coalgebra/Subcoalgebra/Lattice.lean:99`, `:143`, `:150`, `:160`, `:165`, `:172`, and in the PR file at `HopfIdeal.lean:456`, `:467`, `:472`, `:481`, `:488`, `:494`; the HopfIdeal references currently only cite Sweedler and Mathlib at lines 31-35.
findings.fix: Add explicit credit in this file's References section to `TauCeti.Algebra.Coalgebra.Subcoalgebra.Lattice` and/or `TauCeti.Algebra.Coalgebra.Subcomodule.Lattice` as the adapted lattice construction pattern.
findings.issue: The References section omits the central local formal source for the new lattice code: `instSupSet`, `sSup_toIdeal`, `mem_sSup`, `iSup_toIdeal`, `mem_iSup`, and `instCompleteSemilatticeSup` mirror the existing `Subcoalgebra`/`Subcomodule` lattice pattern.

summary: The Hopf-ideal join API credits Sweedler and Mathlib, but the arbitrary-supremum lattice construction closely follows existing TauCeti lattice formalizations without naming them.
